meaning: Office of Naval Intelligence (美国)海军情报局
examples: Slay 10 consecutive Oni in an Infinite Mission.
Slay 30 consecutive Oni in an Infinite Mission.
Had ONI actually gotten a vulnerable man to tell all these lies?
Miss Oni suffered burns to her face and lost her hair and eyelashes.
Samson Oni just missed out on a lifetime best 2.31m to finish third ahead of GB team-mate Martyn Bernard.
